faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Millburn homes?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Millburn properties take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and number of affected drains. Our technicians will inspect all potential breeding sites, treat drains with specialized bio-enzymatic solutions, and provide follow-up recommendations to prevent recurrence.

faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Millburn properties?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic matter that accumulates in pipes, drains, and sewage systems. In Millburn, older homes with mature plumbing systems, restaurants along Millburn Avenue, and properties with infrequently used drains are particularly susceptible. Poor drainage, leaking pipes, and standing water also contribute to infestations.

faqs.question: Are drain fly treatments safe for my Millburn home and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, our drain fly treatments use EPA-approved products that are safe for families, pets, and the environment. We prioritize non-toxic bio-enzymatic cleaners that break down organic matter where drain flies breed, rather than relying solely on harsh chemicals. All treatments are performed by licensed professionals following strict safety protocols.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after drain fly treatment?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in drain fly activity within 2-3 days after treatment as adult flies die off and breeding sites are eliminated. Complete eradication typically occurs within 1-2 weeks. We recommend proper drain maintenance and may schedule a follow-up visit to ensure the infestation is fully resolved in your Millburn property.
